g.text: Toggle the optional extensions to include.
act: act GitHub runner - Run your GitHub Actions locally
bpftool: bpftool - Inspection and simple manipulation of eBPF programs and maps
cosign: sigstore/cosign - Signing OCI containers (and other artifacts) using Sigstore
crane: crane - Tool for managing container images
dotnet: .NET SDK - .NET SDK for building and testing modern C# projects
gcloud: Google Cloud CLI - Google Cloud command line tools
gh: GitHub CLI - GitHub’s official command line tool
nvidia-cuda: NVIDIA CUDA - User-space tooling in Debian, Ubuntu, and Fedora images
php: PHP - With common extensions and Composer
regctl: CLI interface to regclient - the OCI client for registry servers and the OCI Im
shellcheck: ShellCheck - A static analysis tool for shell scripts
skopeo: skopeo - Work with remote container images and registries
